description: Make Oil Great Again (MOGA) is an ATC-20 memecoin representing President Trump’s vision to rebuild Venezuela’s oil infrastructure and economy and restore its oil industry to greatness. Launched on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — MOGA delivers instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fees, and AI-enabled smart contracts, driving it forward with unmatched momentum throughout the Web3 space.
name: Make Oil Great Again
